incidentDescription: The survivor reports threats, money control, and being followed after work.
statement: He keeps threatening me, controls my phone and money, and follows me outside the office.
historySummary: Two prior complaints were noted by the NGO case worker.

timelineEvents.title: Prior complaint
timelineEvents.details: The survivor previously reported threats and economic restriction.

timelineEvents.title: Recent stalking concern
timelineEvents.details: The respondent was seen waiting outside the survivor's workplace.
